content: give me an HTML about how great cats are !
I'll have the team build a fun, self-contained HTML page all about cats!

The project is a single static HTML page celebrating cats. It will include a catchy title, a few sections, nice CSS styling with a warm color palette, and be visually appealing. The project type is static, with no external dependencies. The plan is as follows: 
* index.html - the main HTML page celebrating cats
* style.css - CSS styling for the page
* test_index.html - a test HTML page to verify the layout and design
* README.md - a brief description of the project and its purpose

@Coder the plan is ready.
I'm ready to start writing the files according to the plan. I'll begin with index.html.
